<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="id">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>PipsHeaven · Linktree</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Bebas+Neue&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    min-height: 100vh;
    background: #0a0d14;
    font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 40px 16px;
    position: relative;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 40% at 20% 10%, rgba(0,200,120,0.08) 0%, transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 50% at 80% 80%, rgba(0,120,255,0.07) 0%, transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 60% at 50% 50%, rgba(255,80,60,0.04) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
  }

  body::after {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(0,200,120,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,200,120,0.03) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 40px 40px;
    pointer-events: none;
    z-index: 0;
  }

  .container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 480px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  /* PROFILE */
  .profile {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
    animation: fadeDown 0.6s ease both;
  }

  .avatar-wrap {
    position: relative;
    display: inline-block;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
  }

  .avatar {
    width: 90px;
    height: 90px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 2px solid rgba(0,200,120,0.5);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', cursive;
    font-size: 36px;
    color: #00c878;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f1e14, #0d1a2a);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .avatar img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 50%;
  }

  .avatar-ring {
    position: absolute;
    inset: -6px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00c878, #0068ff, #00c878) border-box;
    -webkit-mask: linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) padding-box, linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);
    -webkit-mask-composite: destination-out;
    mask-composite: exclude;
    animation: spin 6s linear infinite;
  }

  .status-dot {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 4px;
    right: 4px;
    width: 14px;
    height: 14px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: #00c878;
    border: 2px solid #0a0d14;
    animation: pulse 2s ease infinite;
  }

  .name {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', cursive;
    font-size: 32px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: #fff;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }

  .handle {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .bio {
    font-size: 13px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    line-height: 1.6;
    max-width: 320px;
    margin: 0 auto 16px;
  }

  .stats {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 24px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    border: 0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 14px 20px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    max-width: 360px;
  }

  .stat { text-align: center; }

  .stat-num {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', cursive;
    font-size: 22px;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    color: #00c878;
  }

  .stat-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }



  /* SECTION LABEL */
  .section-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin: 24px 0 10px;
    padding-left: 4px;
  }

  /* LINK CARDS */
  .link-card {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 14px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    text-decoration: none;
    color: #fff;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease both;
  }

  .link-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 100%);
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
  }

  .link-card:hover {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
    transform: translateY(-1px);
  }

  .link-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; }

  .icon-box {
    width: 42px;
    height: 42px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    font-size: 18px;
  }

  .icon-green  { background: rgba(0,200,120,0.12);  border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,200,120,0.2); }
  .icon-blue   { background: rgba(0,104,255,0.12);  border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,104,255,0.2); }
  .icon-amber  { background: rgba(255,160,0,0.12);  border: 0.5px solid rgba(255,160,0,0.2); }
  .icon-red    { background: rgba(255,60,60,0.12);   border: 0.5px solid rgba(255,60,60,0.2); }
  .icon-purple { background: rgba(160,80,255,0.12); border: 0.5px solid rgba(160,80,255,0.2); }
  .icon-teal   { background: rgba(0,210,200,0.12);  border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,210,200,0.2); }
  .icon-pink   { background: rgba(255,80,160,0.12); border: 0.5px solid rgba(255,80,160,0.2); }
  .icon-gray   { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }

  .link-text { flex: 1; }

  .link-title {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 500;
    color: #fff;
    margin-bottom: 2px;
  }

  .link-desc {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
  }

  .link-arrow {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    transition: transform 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease;
  }

  .link-card:hover .link-arrow {
    transform: translateX(3px);
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  }

  .badge {
    font-size: 10px;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    margin-left: 6px;
  }

  .badge-green { background: rgba(0,200,120,0.15); color: #00c878; border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,200,120,0.3); }
  .badge-amber { background: rgba(255,160,0,0.15);  color: #ffa000; border: 0.5px solid rgba(255,160,0,0.3); }
  .badge-blue  { background: rgba(0,104,255,0.15);  color: #4d9bff; border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,104,255,0.3); }

  /* FOOTER */
  .footer {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 28px;
    padding-bottom: 20px;
    font-size: 11px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease both;
  }

  /* ANIMATIONS */
  @keyframes fadeDown {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-16px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(12px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  @keyframes spin {
    from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
    to   { transform: rotate(360deg); }
  }

  @keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(0,200,120,0.4); }
    50%       { box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px rgba(0,200,120,0); }
  }



  .link-card:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.10s; }
  .link-card:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.15s; }
  .link-card:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.20s; }
  .link-card:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.25s; }
  .link-card:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.30s; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="container">

  <!-- PROFILE HEADER -->
  <div class="profile">
    <div class="avatar-wrap">
      <div class="avatar">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,
